motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def minimumChanges(s: str, k: int) -> int:
    n = len(s)
    changes = 0
    for i in range(k):
        for j in range(n - i):
            changes += abs(s[j] - s[j + i])
    return changes

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(nk)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
